name: Fate/Strange Fake /// RPG
description:
Ryohgo Narita · TYPE-MOON · KADOKAWA

Fate/Strange Fake

偽りの聖杯戦争 · Snowfield · 米国西部

The Holy Grail War. A ritual where seven Masters summon seven Heroic Spirits as Servants, fighting until one remains, their wish granted by the omnipotent vessel. That is the truth of Fuyuki. But here, in the desert city of Snowfield, California, a different war has begun.

After the Third Holy Grail War, an American organization of mages separate from the Clock Tower stole the ritual's framework. For seventy years they built their own stage. But they failed to copy it perfectly. The Saber class is missing. The definition of "hero" has blurred. Strange Servants have manifested. And somewhere in the cracks, something else slipped in.

Two Grail Wars now run parallel: a "False" war with six Masters and their Servants, and a "True" war hiding beneath it, born from the same stolen ritual. The city of Snowfield is the battlefield. The Church sends its Executors. The Dead Apostles stir. And in the chaos, a girl with haunted eyes arrives, carrying Command Seals she never asked for. This is not the Holy Grail War you know. This is its counterfeit. And it is already spiraling out of control.

✦ 偽 · THE FALSE HOLY GRAIL WAR ✦

Six Masters · Six Servants

Master Tiné Chelc Heiress of a Native American mage lineage. A young mage of Native American descent. She summoned Gilgamesh and seeks to use his power to protect her tribe's sacred land.

Servant · False Archer Gilgamesh King of Heroes · 2/3 Divine The oldest hero, wielder of Gate of Babylon. He finds this fake war beneath his notice, until he senses his only friend.

Master Wolf Silver Wolf Chimera A sentient chimera, a silver wolf with human intelligence. His Master is the scientist who created him. Together they pursue the Grail.

Servant · False Lancer Enkidu Divine Weapon · The One Who Faced the King Gilgamesh's only equal. A divine weapon forged by the gods, returned to Earth. Their reunion shatters the desert outside Snowfield.

Master Orlando Reeve Chief of Police · Clan Calatin Police chief of Snowfield. He leads Clan Calatin, a unit of officers trained to handle supernatural threats. Pragmatic, protective, armed with justice.

Servant · False Caster Alexandre Dumas Author of The Count of Monte Cristo He cannot fight but he can create Noble Phantasms for his Master, forging weapons from stories themselves.

Master Jester Karture Dead Apostle · Sadist A Dead Apostle who delights in chaos. He entered the war not for the Grail but for the pleasure of watching humans and Servants tear each other apart.

Servant · False Assassin Hassan of the 19th Follower Candidate for the Old Man of the Mountain A candidate for the title of Hassan-i-Sabbah. A zealot who serves Jester, bound by twisted loyalty.

Master Flat Escardos Student of Lord El-Melloi II A genius mage from the Clock Tower, student of Lord El-Melloi II. Unpredictable, brilliant, and utterly unhinged.

Servant · False Berserker Jack the Ripper The Nameless Serial Killer of London A Servant who shifts form and identity, drawn to Flat's chaotic energy. The identity behind the legend made manifest.

✦ 真 · THE TRUE HOLY GRAIL WAR ✦

Seven Masters · Seven Servants

Master Ayaka Sajyou Flee
creator: thyanony_
